title: selaginella rupestris f. wrightii
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. wrightii is a species of spore-producing plant, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It is also known as Wright's spikemoss and is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Herbal preparations of Selaginella rupestris f. wrightii include teas and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the plant's leaves or stems in hot water.
